TextWidget.Text: ↑ enemy · click a block to select · click the map to march · drag to box-select or form a line · right-click a waypoint to remove

1. Click a formation's number to select it — or the All chip for the whole army.
2. Click the map to send it there; drag to array several into a line.
3. PATTERNS inserts a ready-made maneuver; SIGNALS arm keys you press mid-battle to spring the next step.
Close and press Ready — your plan executes itself, and your orders still override anything.
